name: Roof Layout
paraphrase: Arrange the roofs so that each distinct roof corresponds to an identifiable social entity in the building or building complex. Place the largest roofs - those which are highest and have the largest span - over the largest, most important, and most communal spaces; build the lesser roofs off these largest and highest roofs; and build the smallest roofs of all off the lesser roofs, in the form of half-vaults and sheds over alcoves and thick walls. The roofscape outside should then register the hierarchy of rooms inside.
